parsed_review.summary: CP00-323 is a clean descriptor-only intake-core service slice (RP10.P02.M07.S07-RP10.P02.M09.S02, 40 units, risk B). Verified via Read/Grep/Glob: (1) Coverage exact — counting deliverable_type across the 40 baseline included_units yields implementation 16, ui 6, claude_review 2, failure_recovery 4, test 8, contract 2, security_audit 2, matching the prompt distribution; micro-title distribution (Test And Golden Case Set 16, Hermes Evidence Packet 22, Claude Review Packet 2) also matches. registry.js, closeout-pack-plan.json packs[CP00-323], and contract current_pack/historical_pack_bindings agree on risk B, unit_count 40, range, upstream CP00-322, next CP00-324. (2) Boundaries — service.js freezeCp323Result and registry no_write_attestation set writes_product_state/creates_database_rows/writes_state_transition/emits_hermes_runtime_receipt/executes_unit_test_runtime_paths all false and no_real_data true; validators.js enforces descriptor_only rows plus permission/audit/lock/validation leak guards; index.js exports all 7 required CP323 functions, exercised by model.test.js and validate-rp10-intake-core-contract.mjs. (3) Authority — contract and descriptors consistently set claude_is_final_approval false and local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust false; production_enterprise_trust_claim is a forbidden review-evidence blocker; Hermes is used only as the H10 deterministic evidence gate, not product runtime. (4) production_ready claim — manifest and command-evidence both report production_ready:false (status implemented_pending_review / pending_final_closeout), an appropriately conservative non-over-claim; descriptor-level production_ready_candidate is a gated local coverage signal only. (5) Review hardening — readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1469-byte valid-JSON stdout); validation-report confirms no forbidden tools, prompt under size limit, and summary-only review correctly prohibited for Risk B. command-evidence shows all expected validation commands (rp05/rp10/closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/fullplan/goal/control-plane/test/validate/build/git-diff) at exit 0. Post-review evidence (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) is not yet present, which is expected since this review run produces it in the hardened sequence; unrelated dirty/untracked files were correctly kept out of pack scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects found. Claude remains read-only reviewer; human final approval still required and not claimed.
